---
title: "<i>Churchwoman, The</i>"
---

## <i>Churchwoman, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

Gertrude Ireland Blackburne was co-editor of <i>The Churchwoman </i>(1897-1905).  It may be the same as <i>The English Churchwoman, </i>which continued <i>Our Paper : The monthly journal of the Church of England Women's Help Society</i>  and appears to have existed June 1883-December 1911.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
